value.found_quote:
## Default System Behaviors & Guardrails

When an action is not explicitly listed in your Allow, Deny, or Ask lists, Antigravity falls back to secure system defaults:

1.  **Web Browsing Defaults to Ask:** Actions for `read_url` and `execute_url` default to **Ask**. ... 2.  **Workspaces are Auto-Allowed:** In standard operation, reading and writing files inside your active project directory is automatically allowed.
value.name: Default System Behaviors & Guardrails (workspaces auto-allowed, web browsing defaults to Ask)
